title: betula fruticosa subsp. gmelinii
intro: Betula fruticosa subsp. gmelinii, also known as the Birch Leaf White Birch or Gmelin's Birch, is a subspecies of the Betula fruticosa plant, which is a type of birch tree native to eastern Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Betula fruticosa subsp. gmelinii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting cardiovascular health. Betula fruticosa subsp. gmelinii is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made from the bark, leaves, or roots of the plant.
